access_types.name: Button_Callback
access_types.code:
type Button_Callback is access procedure (Button : Button_Id;
                                          State  : Button_State);

documentation.description: Indicate the current state of the requested button

subprograms.name: Subscribe
subprograms.code: function Subscribe (Callback : not null Button_Callback) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Add Callback to the list of subscribers. Return False if Callback cannot
be added.

Callback will be executed each time a button state changes.

subprograms.name: Unsubscribe
subprograms.code: function Unsubscribe (Callback : not null Button_Callback) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Remove Callback from the list of subscribers. Return False if Callback
is not in the list of sucbscribers.
